registration_mode.hint: meta registers discovery/call tools only. per_command registers each allowed command as its own LLM tool. both enables both modes.

expose_builtin_commands.hint: Keep this disabled unless you explicitly want built-in management commands to be callable by the LLM.

allow_admin_commands.description: Allow commands protected by admin permission
allow_admin_commands.hint: Admin commands remain blocked by default even when they are discovered.

allow_plugins.hint: When non-empty, only these plugin names can be exposed.

deny_plugins.hint: Plugin names that must never be exposed.

allow_commands.hint: Optional command allowlist. Accepts command names, command IDs, tool names, plugin:command, or plugin.command.

deny_commands.hint: Commands that must never be exposed. Accepts command names, command IDs, tool names, plugin:command, or plugin.command.

tool_timeout_seconds.hint: The timeout is clamped to the range 1-300 seconds.
